stemHtml: An aircraft when tracking inbound with a TAS of 150 kt onto a VOR on the 325° radial, experiences a drift of 10° right. The same aircraft after departure with a TAS of 150 kt tracks outbound on the 075° radial of the same VOR, experiencing a drift of 10° right. What is the wind velocity and direction (T°), if magnetic variation is 8° East?
